sources.title: 1989 - Bloodfight - Enter if you dare - The Ultimate Martial Arts Clash!
sources.description:
A fallen champion (Simon Yam) storms back into the underground tournament circuit with fists of fury! Two years after tragedy struck his protégé, he faces legendary fighters and personal demons in a no-holds-barred quest for redemption. Expect jaw-dropping choreography, intense rivalries, and a historic collision of Hong Kong and Japanese action styles!

Original title: Fainaru faito - Saigo no ichigeki
Alternative title: Bloodfight / Final Fight

Director: Shûji Gotô
Writer: Yoshiaki Kashigawa
Genres: Martial Arts, Action, Adventure, Drama

⭐️ STARRING
Yasuaki Kurata - Masahiro Kai 
Simon Yam (as Yam Tat Wah) - Ryu Tenmei
Meg Lam (as Ken-Ming Lum) - Suzie Wong
Anzu Lawson - Milly McKenzie 
Bolo Yeung - Chang Lee, the Vietnamese Snake
Stuart Smith - Gang Leader

💥 WHY IT ROCKS
• First-ever Hong Kong-Japanese co-production filmed ENTIRELY in English!
• Simon Yam like you've never seen him - trading gangster swagger for roundhouse kicks!
• Real martial arts mastery from Kurata (Bruce Lee's training partner!)
• Cult classic that paved the way for 90s fight cinema

More Martial Arts films:  https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2gsu7VGzgdatMxbjVFrbl6QrPEvFjhBb

@CultCinemaClassics

metadata.Plot: Masahiro Kai has made it to the finals of the Free Fighting Championship. In flashback, he remembers training Ryu Tenmei for the event. Ryu makes it to the final bout against the reigning champ, Chang Lee. After Lee kills Ryu, Kai sinks into alcoholism, tangling with a gang of Americans, until he decides to go back into training and defeat Chang Lee himself.
metadata.Actors: Yasuaki Kurata, Simon Yam, Meg Lam
